## What

Describe the change and the user-facing behavior it affects.

## Why

Explain the problem, workflow, or safety gap this addresses.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run` when package, docs, action, or release files change

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private customer data were committed.
- [ ] Generated packs or reports redact secrets.
- [ ] MCP/tooling changes preserve read-only defaults unless explicitly documented.
